meaning: Federal Crop Insurance Corporation(美国农业部)联邦农作物保险公司
examples: There was minimal mention of a minimal number of audit firms in the final FCIC report.
Today the Oracle of Omaha, Warren Buffett, was subpoenaed to testify as a witness in front of the U.S. Financial Crisis Inquiry Commission (FCIC).
The final FCIC report contains minimal mention of the audit firms.
